The Policy Game

🎓 Reading Level — pick your grade

How to Play

Each round gives you a real policy challenge with four possible responses. Pick your grade level and the questions are written at that reading level. Your nation has four health bars — Happiness, Economy, Education, and Freedom — and every choice nudges them up or down. Help all your citizens to finish a term, then keep governing term after term and climb the class leaderboard.

😊Citizen Happiness

How satisfied and secure residents feel day-to-day. Drops when policies create instability, shortages, or lost rights.

💰Economic Health

The strength of jobs, growth, and prosperity. Sensitive to taxes, regulation, and government spending.

📚Education Quality

How well schools prepare young people. Affected by competition, funding allocation, and government control.

🗽Individual Freedom

The degree to which citizens can live, speak, and work without government interference. Fragile once eroded.

Live example, watch Individual Freedom drop into the danger zone:
😊 Happiness
💰 Economy
📚 Education
🗽 Freedom
⚠️ DANGER. Individual Freedom below 25%! Society collapsing…
